skills.name: perspectives
skills.description: Draft Microsoft Perspectives feedback through guided conversation. Produces polished, positive, impact-focused feedback in the official Keep doing / Re-think / Additional thoughts format.

skills.name: connect
skills.description: Draft a complete Microsoft Connect self-reflection and companion Impact Card through guided conversation. Covers all 5 Connect form sections with evidence-based, calibration-optimized output.

skills.name: authoring-toolbox-prompts
skills.description: Author and upgrade .ttp / .ttt threat-hunting prompts for the Toolbox_EXE library. Enforces 7-block SystemPrompt anatomy, MITRE-mapped JSON findings, verbatim attribution, and tiered impact levers (severity + confidence rubrics, prompt-injection hardening, coherence checks). Ships templates, a before/after upgrade example, and a format validator.
